title: Allow Board Members to Rearrange Columns in Table View
excerpt:

posts.author: fmiller (Forrest Miller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, members cannot move columns in board views if the board permissions are set to anything other than “Edit Everything.” Since board views don’t affect that main table, there is no harm in members being able to change the order there. Please add an additional permission option to rearrange board views!

What are you trying to achieve

Make the UI easier and more intuitive to use.
